server {
  server_name gemini;
  listen %s;

  default_type 'application/json';

  location ~ ^/v1/chat/completions/gemini-2.5-flash {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local json = require("cjson.safe")
      local test_models = require "spec.helpers.ai.test_models"

      local token = ngx.req.get_headers()["authorization"]
      if token == "Bearer gemini-key" then
        ngx.req.read_body()
        local body, err = ngx.req.get_body_data()
        body, err = json.decode(body)

        ngx.status = 200
        ngx.print(test_models.read_fixture("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-chat/responses/good-gemini-2.5-flash.json"))
      end
    }
  }

  location ~ ^/v1/chat/completions/query-auth {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local json = require("cjson.safe")

      -- Check for query parameter authentication
      local args = ngx.req.get_uri_args()
      if args.key == "gemini-query-key" then
        ngx.req.read_body()
        local body, err = ngx.req.get_body_data()
        body, err = json.decode(body)

        ngx.status = 200
        ngx.print(pl_file.read("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-chat/responses/good.json"))
      else
        ngx.status = 401
        ngx.print('{"error": "Unauthorized"}')
      end
    }
  }

  location ~ ^/v1/chat/completions/fail-model-armor {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"

      ngx.status = 200
      ngx.print(pl_file.read("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-chat/responses/fails-model-armor-floor.json"))
    }
  }

  location ~ ^/v1/chat/completions {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local json = require("cjson.safe")
      local capture_path = "%s"
      local test_models = require "spec.helpers.ai.test_models"

      local token = ngx.req.get_headers()["authorization"]
      local api_key = ngx.req.get_headers()["x-goog-api-key"]
      if token == "Bearer gemini-key" or api_key == "123" then
        ngx.req.read_body()
        local body, err = ngx.req.get_body_data()
        body, err = json.decode(body)
        local generation_config = body.generationConfig or {}
        local thinking_config = generation_config.thinkingConfig or {}
        if capture_path ~= "" then
          pl_file.write(capture_path, json.encode({
            -- For Gemini 3+
            thinking_level = thinking_config.thinkingLevel,
            -- For Gemini 2.5
            thinking_budget = thinking_config.thinkingBudget,
            include_thoughts = thinking_config.includeThoughts,
            stream = body.stream,
          }))
        end

        if body.stream then
          local event_chunks = {
            '[',
            '{"candidates": [{"content": {"parts": [{"text": "2"}], "role": "model"}, "finishReason": "STOP", "index": 0}]}',
            ']',
          }

          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.header["Content-Type"] = "application/json"

          for _, event in ipairs(event_chunks) do
            ngx.print(event)
            ngx.flush(true)
            ngx.sleep(0.01)
          end
        else
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(test_models.read_fixture("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-chat/responses/good.json"))
        end
      end
    }
  }

  # /v1/messages native mode without custom upstream url
  location ~ ^/v1beta/models/[^/]+:[^/]+ {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local json = require("cjson.safe")
      local uri = ngx.var.uri
      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
  
      local token = ngx.req.get_headers()["authorization"]
      if token ~= "Bearer gemini-key" then
        ngx.status = 401
        ngx.print('{"error": "Unauthorized"}')
        return
      end
  
      if method == "POST" and uri:match('/models/([%%w%%.%%-]+):batchGenerateContent$') then
        -- create batch
        ngx.status = 200
        ngx.print(pl_file.read("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/created.json"))
        return
      end
  
      ngx.req.read_body()
      local body, err = ngx.req.get_body_data()
      body, err = json.decode(body)
  
      ngx.status = 200
      ngx.print(pl_file.read("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-chat/responses/native-good.json"))
    }
  }

  # /v1/messages native mode with custom upstream url
  location ~ ^/custom/chat/v1beta/models/[^/]+:[^/]+ {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local json = require("cjson.safe")

      local token = ngx.req.get_headers()["authorization"]
      if token ~= "Bearer gemini-key" then
        ngx.status = 401
        ngx.print('{"error": "Unauthorized"}')
        return
      end

      ngx.req.read_body()
      local body, err = ngx.req.get_body_data()
      body, err = json.decode(body)

      ngx.status = 200
      ngx.print(pl_file.read("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-chat/responses/native-good.json"))
    }
  }
  
  location ~ ^/v1/embeddings {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local json = require("cjson.safe")

      local token = ngx.req.get_headers()["authorization"]
      if token == "Bearer gemini-key" then
        ngx.req.read_body()
        local body, err = ngx.req.get_body_data()
        body, err = json.decode(body)
        
        ngx.status = 200
        ngx.print(pl_file.read("spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/llm-v1-embeddings/responses/good.json"))
      end
    }
  }

  location ~ ^/v1/ {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local cjson = require "cjson.safe"
      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
      local uri = ngx.var.uri

      local batch_name = "projects/432057123508/locations/us-central1/batchPredictionJobs/2037446585876480"
      local model_name = "publishers/google/models/gemini-2.5-pro"
      local inputConfig = {
        instancesFormat = "jsonl",
        gcsSource = {
          uris = {"gs://aigw-test/vertex_batch_file.jsonl"}
        }
      }

      local outputConfig = {
        predictionsFormat = 'jsonl',
        gcsDestination = { outputUriPrefix = 'gs://aigw-test/',},
      }

      local list_resp = cjson.encode({
        batchPredictionJobs = {
          { name = batch_name, displayName = batch_name, inputConfig = inputConfig, outputConfig = outputConfig },
        },
      })

      local create_or_get_resp = cjson.encode({ name = batch_name, })

      local delete_resp = cjson.encode({ name = "operation" })

      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
      if uri:match("/v1/projects/[^/]+/locations/[^/]+/batchPredictionJobs$") then
        -- list
        if method == "GET" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(list_resp)

        -- create
        elseif method == "POST" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(create_or_get_resp)
        end

      elseif uri:match("/v1/projects/[^/]+/locations/[^/]+/batchPredictionJobs/[^/]+:cancel$") then
        -- cancel
        ngx.status = 200
        ngx.print("{}")

      elseif uri:match("/v1/projects/[^/]+/locations/[^/]+/batchPredictionJobs/[^/]+$") then
        -- delete
        if method == "DELETE" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(delete_resp)

        -- get
        elseif method == "GET" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(create_or_get_resp)
        end

      else
        ngx.status = 400
      end
    }
  }

  # gemini batches custom upstream url endpoint
  location ~ ^/custom/batches/v1beta/ {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
      local uri = ngx.var.uri

      local path
      local match = true
      if method == "GET" then
        if uri:match('/batches$') then
          -- list
          path = "spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/list.json"

        elseif uri:match('/batches/([%%w]+)$') then
          -- get
          path = "spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/get.json"

        else match = false
        end

      elseif method == "POST" then
        if uri:match('/models/([%%w%%.%%-]+):batchGenerateContent$') then
          -- create
          path = "spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/created.json"

        elseif uri:match('/batches/([%%w]+):cancel$') then
          -- cancel
          match = true

        else
          match = false
        end

      elseif method == "DELETE" then
        if not uri:match('/batches/([%%w]+)$') then
          -- DELETE
          match = false
        end

      else match = false
      end

      if match then
        ngx.status = 200
        if path then
          ngx.print(pl_file.read(path))

        else ngx.print("{}")
        end

      else
        ngx.status = 404
      end

      return
    }
  }

  # gemini batches endpoint for default upstream path
  location ~ ^/v1beta/ {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
      local uri = ngx.var.uri

      local path
      local match = true
      if method == "GET" then
        if uri:match('/batches$') then
          -- list
          path = "spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/list.json"

        elseif uri:match('/batches/([%%w]+)$') then
          -- get
          path = "spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/get.json"

        else match = false
        end

      elseif method == "POST" then
        if uri:match('/models/([%%w%%.%%-]+):batchGenerateContent$') then
          -- create
          path = "spec/fixtures/ai-proxy/gemini/batches/created.json"

        elseif uri:match('/batches/([%%w]+):cancel$') then
          -- cancel
          match = true

        else
          match = false
        end

      elseif method == "DELETE" then
        if not uri:match('/batches/([%%w]+)$') then
          -- DELETE
          match = false
        end
      
      else match = false
      end

      if match then
        ngx.status = 200
        if path then
          ngx.print(pl_file.read(path))

        else ngx.print("{}")
        end

      else
        ngx.status = 404
      end

      return
    }
  }

  location ~ ^/custom/vertex/batches/v1/ {
    content_by_lua_block {
      local pl_file = require "pl.file"
      local cjson = require "cjson.safe"
      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
      local uri = ngx.var.uri

      local batch_name = "projects/432057123508/locations/us-central1/batchPredictionJobs/2037446585876480"
      local model_name = "publishers/google/models/gemini-2.5-pro"
      local inputConfig = {
        instancesFormat = "jsonl",
        gcsSource = {
          uris = {"gs://aigw-test/vertex_batch_file.jsonl"}
        }
      }

      local outputConfig = {
        predictionsFormat = 'jsonl',
        gcsDestination = { outputUriPrefix = 'gs://aigw-test/',},
      }

      local list_resp = cjson.encode({
        batchPredictionJobs = {
          { name = batch_name, displayName = batch_name, inputConfig = inputConfig, outputConfig = outputConfig },
        },
      })

      local create_or_get_resp = cjson.encode({ name = batch_name, })

      local delete_resp = cjson.encode({ name = "operation" })

      local method = ngx.req.get_method()
      if uri:match("/v1/projects/[^/]+/locations/[^/]+/batchPredictionJobs$") then
        -- list
        if method == "GET" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(list_resp)

        -- create
        elseif method == "POST" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(create_or_get_resp)
        end

      elseif uri:match("/v1/projects/[^/]+/locations/[^/]+/batchPredictionJobs/[^/]+:cancel$") then
        -- cancel
        ngx.status = 200

      elseif uri:match("/v1/projects/[^/]+/locations/[^/]+/batchPredictionJobs/[^/]+$") then
        -- delete
        if method == "DELETE" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(delete_resp)

        -- get
        elseif method == "GET" then
          ngx.status = 200
          ngx.print(create_or_get_resp)
        end

      else
        ngx.status = 400
      end
    }
  }
}
